index.description: L2 index of methodologies in the hr domain. The retriever reads this after picking hr from L1 domains.xml. Entries list slug + tier + summary; open the leaf meta.json / content/*.xml for full payload.

methodology.summary: Three-phase new-hire ramp (Learn / Contribute / Execute) with observable milestones anchored to real team work, co-authored on Day 1.
Outcomes-based contractor JD for micro-agencies; explicit deliverables, paid-trial gate, IP clause, payment cadence — not a full-time JD with 'contract' relabeled.
Five-pillar EVP (Compensation / Benefits / Career / Work Environment / Culture-Purpose), each pillar backed by ≥3 named proof points before external publication.
Strategy + execution for an employer brand (Glassdoor, LinkedIn, careers page, testimonials, content calendar) where every external asset traces to a named EVP pillar.
Structured-interview bundle (competencies → questions → scorecards → debrief): cap competencies at 4-6, behavioral anchors observable verbs only.
End-to-end repeatable onboarding program: preboarding, Day 1 orientation, buddy pairing, 30-60-90 progression, feedback loops, manager guides, remote adaptations.
First-30-day phase: Week 1 orientation, Week 2 foundation, Weeks 3-4 deep-dive with first deliverable — milestone is contribution, not training completion.
Two-phase ramp framework producing a day-60 gate + day-90 review checklist anchored to artifacts.
Produces a calibrated rubric for scoring paid test tasks with anti-bias controls and pay-on-completion contract.
Full-cycle hiring playbook step covering sourcing, JD, screening, interview, offer, with metric-anchored gates.
Produces a funnel report identifying the single bottleneck stage and an experiment plan to lift its conversion.
Retention diagnostic and compliance audit report with prioritized fix list per regulation domain.
Produces a defensible promotion case for senior-track promotions in an outsource/agency context with client-billable evidence.
Per-competency STAR question bank with calibration anchors — a vetted reusable interviewer checklist.
Calibrated STAR rubric: per-competency anchors, scoring scale, debrief contract — produces a usable interview scorecard.
STAR method playbook step: how to probe Situation/Task/Action/Result completeness in real time and produce evidence-anchored notes.
Produces a structured interview spec: round map, competency-to-round assignment, scorecard, debrief contract.
